a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Women's educational attainment vs. fertility rate, 1950 to 2020
The total fertility rate summarizes the total number of births a woman would have, if she experienced the birth rates
seen in women of each age group in one particular year across her childbearing years. Educational attainment is the
average number of years of formal education received by women between the ages of 15 and 64.
Data source: UN, World Population Prospects (2024); Barro and Lee (2015); Lee and Lee (2016)
